rule CDB_Browser_Security_ZeroDays_Are_Only_Part_ {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Browser Security: Zero-Days Are Only Part of the Problem"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-07-11"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-INGEST" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}
